input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.2.5.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.2.5.2
            TITLE: installation of the lap belts must go in a straight line from the mounting point until they reach

            CONTENT:
            rule T.2.5.2: Installation of the Lap Belts must go in a straight line from the mounting point until they reach
T.2.5.2 Installation of the Lap Belts must go in a straight line from the mounting point until they reach 
the driver's body without touching any hole in the seat or any other intermediate structure

final_answer: Installation of the Lap Belts must go in a straight line from the mounting point until they reach the driver's body without touching any hole in the seat or any other intermediate structure
